one_time_description: Chief and Headmen Salary Claim Settlement received in prior year (2023); also $1,176,000 of WCH expenditures under ISC review
economic_notes: Willow Cree Developments Limited Partnership established for economic development purposes. Cree Nation has guaranteed LP long-term debt up to $4,100,000. Also holds investments in TIPI-IMI Insurance Partners (5%) and AIC Investment Consulting LP.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to serious internal control deficiencies at Willow Cree Health Services Corporation (WCH) identified in FY2023 audit which led to a disclaimer of opinion that year; comparability of WCH figures affected. $1,176,000 of prior-year WCH expenditures under ISC review. Consolidated entities include: Beardy's and Okemasis Cree Nation, Willow Cree Health Services Corporation, CMHC Housing Program, Beardy's & Okemasis Legacy Trust, and Willow Budz. Willow Cree Developments Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). Long-term debt total of $4,959,440 includes current portion of $747,000. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $34,373,348 + CMHC $2,642,430 + Prairie Spirit School Division $399,712 + Gov't of Saskatchewan $133,339 + Public Health Agency of Canada $100,000 + Department of Justice Canada $70,198 + Saskatchewan Ministry of Justice $72,947 + Correction Services Canada $327,748 + FSEIN $709,623 + ISEDCAN $14,714 + SITAG $506530 = ~$39,350,589; OSR includes lease income, retail sales, house rental, NLTCDC, Legacy Trust income, earnings from business entities, and other.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
